docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM MARK SCHREIBER FILED BY REN, LUCIA LU, ABRAHAM

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-30-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-30-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. COURT CERTIFIED INTERPRETER TOM LAM PRESENT ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF REN, LUCIA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00 WAIVED) SERVED SEP-22-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LU, ABRAHAM
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF REN, LUCIA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY REN, LUCIA AS TO DEFENDANT LU, ABRAHAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-30-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-30-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REN, LUCIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LU, ABRAHAM PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PROVEN THAT DEFENDANT WAS NEGLIGENT OR OTHERWISE RESPONISBLE FOR THE LOSS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
